title: Reign of Nether - KareAkern Edition
description: Reign Of Nether modpack with optimizations and worldgen tweaks for the KareAkern Minecraft server
body:
![Welcome image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d52806f697a007af627ea5a6dc23dcedfce1dab.png)
**Reign of Nether - KareAkern Edition** is a Modpack designed around the mod Reign of Nether RTS


Reign of Nether turns Minecraft into a Real Time Strategy game, or "RTS" for short.

The goal of this pack is to add extra optimization to the mod, give unique world generation, and add quality of life changes without compromising gameplay expereience and authenticity.

This pack was created for the use of the KareAkern minecraft server for an upcoming Reign of the nether event, but anybody is free is use it!
---

<details>
<summary>Using Embeddium</summary>

There is an alternate version of this modpack with Embeddium installed for lower-end PCs, sacrificing a few features for better performance. To install, go to the "Versions" tab and install the modpack labelled "RON + Embeddium". 

Be aware: some visuals of Reign of Nether such as transparent leaves and Fog of War will be broken, though gameplay should work as normal. Animated Chunks is also disabled.

It's recommended to enable the Invisileafs resource pack with Embeddium enabled.
</details>

---
**Features of the pack include**
* Physics Mod - Makes the destruction of buildings and death of units way more chaotic and exciting! 💥
* Ambient Sounds - Enhances the atmosphere of the game with environmental audio which makes dull moments less silent ⛈️
* Terralith - Makes Reign of Nether terrain more diverse and unique ⛰️
* E4MC - Play with your friends and battle eachother in RTS mode! ⚔️
* Many shader packs to choose from! 🪄
<details>
<summary>Note</summary>

Yeah IK the list is small, this is supposed to be for people with potato hardware T~T
</details>


<details>
<summary>Guide for Lag</summary>

If you experience low framerates or lag, try the following in order:
* Turn off shaders
* Remove Physics Mod
* Lower render distance to 12 and disable Animated Chunks
* In game press the 'M' key and go to the option "Set leaves to:" and switch it to 'ALL'
* If you are running the default pack, switch to the Embeddium version
</details>

---
**Credits:**


Resource packs -
* [Invisileafs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/invisi-leafs) - By Purrrpley
* [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player) - By TrasTick
  
Shader packs - 
* [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) - By EminGT
* [Miniature Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/miniature-shader) - By Ukrech

Sole devs of this pack are nightwatch3r (srayannayan on modrinth) and Easyidle123 

FancyMenu customizations and config tweaks were made by nightwatcher and assisted by easyidle

None of the mods in this pack are developed or maintained by us
---
